note: Deterministic golden-set for the Swift RedFlagDetector (Principle 6, Phase 0). These test the CODE path (no model in the loop): each `text` is fed to RedFlagDetector.detect() and must yield the expected rule id (or null for benign). Mirrors rounds/Engine/RedFlagDetector.swift + brain/red-flag-symptoms.json. A regression here is RELEASE-BLOCKING: under-firing on a canonical emergency must fail the build; the benign cases guard against alert-fatigue. TODO: a CI runner that loads the bundled JSON and asserts these without spawning the model.

mustFire.text: chest pressure spreading to my jaw and left arm, sweaty, 40 minutes
my face is drooping and my speech is slurred all of a sudden
my throat is closing and I can't breathe after a bee sting
I've been having thoughts of ending my life
worst headache of my life, came on in seconds
I can't breathe and I'm gasping for air
high fever and a stiff neck with confusion
I'm 30 weeks pregnant with heavy bleeding and severe pain

mustNotFire: I've had a dull ache on the inside of my elbow for 3 weeks
what does my low ferritin mean?
mild headache after a long day
my knee hurts a bit when I run
I feel a bit tired and bloated lately
